root_text.sn35.142:1.2: Yopi hetu, yopi paccayo cakkhussa uppādāya, sopi anattā.
root_text.sn35.142:1.3: Anattasambhūtaṁ, bhikkhave, cakkhu kuto attā bhavissati …pe…
root_text.sn35.142:1.5: Yopi hetu yopi paccayo jivhāya uppādāya, sopi anattā.
root_text.sn35.142:1.6: Anattasambhūtā, bhikkhave, jivhā kuto attā bhavissati …pe…
root_text.sn35.142:1.8: Yopi hetu yopi paccayo manassa uppādāya, sopi anattā.
root_text.sn35.142:1.9: Anattasambhūto, bhikkhave, mano kuto attā bhavissati.

translation_text.sn35.142:1.2: The cause and reason that gives rise to the eye is also not-self.
translation_text.sn35.142:1.3: Since the eye is produced by what is not-self, how could it be self?
translation_text.sn35.142:1.8: The cause and reason that gives rise to the mind is also not-self.
translation_text.sn35.142:1.9: Since the mind is produced by what is not-self, how could it be self?
translation_text.sn35.142:1.11: They understand: ‘… there is nothing further for this place.’”
